effect: [On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and add up to 1 card to the top of your Life cards. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
name: Marshall.D.Teach
trigger: [Trigger] Negate the effect of up to 1 of your opponent's Characters during this turn. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 5 or less.
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
